summary: Scraping pipeline and live data features tested successfully. Backend: 16/16 tests passed covering scraping APIs, product data quality, and supplier links. Frontend: All key features working - Dashboard shows live data freshness indicator, Discover page displays real scraped products with images/prices/categories, Product detail page shows View Supplier button with valid AliExpress search URLs.

minor.issue: FIXED: Was returning 500 due to MongoDB ObjectId serialization. Fixed by copying summary dict before insert_one in orchestrator._save_ingestion_run()
These scrapers fail with HTTP 404 - blocked by anti-bot. Expected behavior per main agent notes.

integration_issues.issue: Mixed Content error for /api/notifications - appears to be Emergent preview environment script issue (emergent-main.js), not application code

issues: Onboarding modal blocks first-time user interaction (has Skip button)

passed_tests: Backend: API health check
Backend: POST /api/ingestion/scrape/amazon_movers returns scraped products
Backend: GET /api/ingestion/scrape/health returns source status
Backend: GET /api/ingestion/scrape/history returns ingestion runs
Backend: GET /api/ingestion/scrape/quality returns data quality report
Backend: GET /api/products returns products list
Backend: Products have is_real_data=true flag
Backend: Products have supplier_link URLs
Backend: Supplier links are valid AliExpress search URLs
Backend: Products have trend_score > 0
Backend: Products have last_updated timestamps
Backend: Products span multiple diverse categories
Backend: API metadata includes live_data_count statistics
Backend: Product detail includes supplier_link field
Backend: POST /api/ingestion/scrape/full requires API key
Backend: POST /api/ingestion/scrape/full returns aggregated results
Frontend: Dashboard shows 'Live data' freshness indicator with timestamp
Frontend: Discover page shows real products with images, prices, categories
Frontend: Product detail page shows View Supplier button
Frontend: View Supplier links to valid AliExpress search URL
Frontend: Launch Score, Trend Score, Margin, Competitors displayed correctly
Frontend: Launch recommendation card shows strengths/concerns
critical_code_review_comments: Scraping implementation using curl_cffi with chrome impersonation works well for Amazon UK Movers & Shakers
AliExpress supplier links are correctly auto-generated from product names in amazon_scraper._parse_product_item()
Data freshness indicator pulls from product last_updated timestamps - correctly shows live data status
Full scrape endpoint had ObjectId serialization bug - FIXED in orchestrator.py
seed_data_creation: None - tests use existing scraped product data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Scraping pipeline fully tested. Key endpoints: POST /api/ingestion/scrape/amazon_movers (works), POST /api/ingestion/scrape/full (works, 2/4 sources succeed). Amazon movers scraper successfully fetches real products with names, prices, images, BSR changes. Supplier links auto-generated as AliExpress search URLs. Frontend correctly displays live data indicator, product images, View Supplier button. Full scrape ObjectId bug has been fixed.
